Notice Of Motion To Quash Service Of Summons For Lack Of Personal Jurisdiction; Memo P/A
Off Calendar May-24-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT WILLIAM SHINE CO., WILLIAM SHINE Motion To Quash Service Of Summons For Lack Of Personal Jurisdiction is Granted. Plaintiff has not met its burden of showing proper service on defendant Lombard Street Loan Company. The Court denies the request for sanctions. Order submitted with the courtesy copies was signed in open court. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077

Off Calendar Dec-12-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT WILLIAM SHINE CO., WILLIAM SHINE DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT.
Appearances: David B. Golden of Golden Kopcke (399.9994) for plaintiff and responding party; Michele L. McKee of O'Kane & McKee (760.459.2357) appearing via Court Call for defendant and moving party.
Argued and the court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: overruled with ten days to answer. A demurrer is a non-speaking objection to the pleading, but moving party bases this demurrer on two declarations. Order signed. (302/HEK) Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077
